text: Status reconciliation pass (detect open aims already implemented)
description: The graph drifts from reality: 8ae9e8da, fe0e0aaf, b3f8518f, 4e50493a were all already implemented in code but still marked open. A reconciliation pass should flag open aims whose described work appears present in the codebase (heuristic: keyword/symbol search, or an LLM check against the diff/tree) so they can be confirmed done. Reduces the gap between the aim graph and the actual implementation.

status.comment: Broken into 3 heuristic steps 2026-06-28, strongest-first: (1) 6606def4 commit-reference reconciliation — DONE this commit (reconcile_status MCP tool: OPEN aims cited by >=1 git commit, deterministic/cheap/high-precision); (2) da1291e5 code-presence keyword/symbol heuristic — open (covers aims implemented without a commit citing their id); (3) c968f026 LLM-judged check for ambiguous candidates — open (gated behind the cheap signals to bound cost). All three are read-only review reports feeding update_aim, never auto-marking done. Parent stays partially until (2) lands (and optionally (3)).
